---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 💡 Motivation
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## 🎯 Use Case
Describe the specific scenario where this feature would be valuable:
- Who would use this feature?
- How would they use it?
- What value would it provide?

## 📋 Proposed Solution
Describe your ideal implementation:
- What should the user interface look like?
- What data would be needed?
- How should it integrate with existing features?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
What other approaches or solutions have you considered?

## 📊 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## 🔗 Related Issues
List any related issues or discussions (if applicable).

## 📈 Priority Assessment
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Must have for my use case
- [ ] High - Very important for my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 🛠️ Implementation Ideas (Optional)
If you have technical ideas about how to implement this, please share them here.
